01 / About

A builder who learned that
securing beats creating.

// ERODE · TAMIL NADU · IN

From a young age I was the kid who took things apart just to understand them — wires, boards, machines, and code. That curiosity turned into assembling PCs and tinkering at the hardware level long before I called it a career.

Then a realization hit me: building something is only half the story — securing it is what makes it last. That single idea pulled me deep into cybersecurity, and I haven't looked back since.

"You can't defend what you don't truly understand — and I understand systems from the silicon up."

Where I'm headed: a red or blue team role — testing, breaking, and defending real infrastructure. But I'm not waiting for "someday": I've already built the tools, earned the certifications, and put in the lab hours. I'm ready to contribute now. Open to roles across India and abroad.

Proven, Not Claimed

2 security tools designed, built & shipped — fully documented on GitHub.

Certified in 2026

AWS Solutions Architect, CompTIA Network+ & Quick Heal Forensics.

HW × SW Edge

6+ yrs hardware fused with software security — I get systems end to end.
